words.laoTranslation: ບົດບັງ, ສ້າງຄວາມເສົ້າໝອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ทอดเงา, สร้างความเสื่อมเสีย/เศร้าหมอง
words.definition: To spoil a situation or make it less enjoyable.
words.exampleSentence: The bad news cast a shadow over the entire party.

words.laoTranslation: ຫັນເຫອອກຈາກ, ບໍ່ເປັນໄປຕາມ
words.thaiTranslation: เบี่ยงเบนออกจาก, ไม่เป็นไปตามแผน
words.definition: To depart from an established course or norm.
words.exampleSentence: Do not deviate from the safety rules during the flight.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫັນໄດ້ຊັດເຈນຢ່າງຈະແຈ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: เห็นได้อย่างชัดเจนแจ้งแจ้ง
words.definition: Completely clear and impossible to ignore or doubt.
words.exampleSentence: It was blatantly obvious that he was lying.

words.laoTranslation: ຄຳຮ້ອງຂໍຢ່າງຈິງຈັງ
words.thaiTranslation: คำร้องขออย่างจริงจัง/จริงใจ
words.definition: A sincere and deeply felt ask.
words.exampleSentence: She made an earnest request for help from her neighbors.

words.laoTranslation: ເພີ່ມກຳລັງ, ກ້າວໜ້າໄວຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: เริ่มมีกระแส, เพิ่มความเร็ว/แรง
words.definition: To increase in speed, force, or progress over time.
words.exampleSentence: The campaign is starting to gain momentum across the country.

words.laoTranslation: ແຕກຕ່າງກັນຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรงกันข้ามอย่างสิ้นเชิง
words.definition: In a way that shows a very clear and obvious difference.
words.exampleSentence: His clean room was in stark contrast to his brother's messy one.

words.laoTranslation: ມີຄ່າໃຊ້ຈ່າຍເກີດຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: มีค่าใช้จ่ายเกิดขึ้น
words.definition: To experience costs as a result of an action.
words.exampleSentence: You will incur additional expenses if you travel first class.

words.laoTranslation: ປາກົດໃຫ້ເຫັນເປັນເລື່ອງໃຫຍ່
words.thaiTranslation: ปรากฏเป็นเรื่องใหญ่/น่ากังวล
words.definition: To seem important, prominent, and often worrying.
words.exampleSentence: The upcoming exams loomed large in the students' minds.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມລົ້ມເຫຼວຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ
words.thaiTranslation: ความล้มเหลวอย่างสิ้นเชิง
words.definition: A complete and utter lack of success.
words.exampleSentence: The new product launch was an abject failure.

words.laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບຢ່າງເລິກເຊິ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบอย่างลึกซึ้ง
words.definition: An intense or significant effect on something.
words.exampleSentence: The invention of printing had a profound impact on history.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຫົວຫອກນຳພາໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นหัวหอก/ผู้นำโครงการ
words.definition: To lead an initiative or collective effort.
words.exampleSentence: She was chosen to spearhead the new research project.

words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງຂ້າມຄວາມສຳຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: มองข้ามความสำคัญ, ทึกทักเอาเอง
words.definition: To fail to properly appreciate something or someone.
words.exampleSentence: We often take our good health for granted until we get sick.

words.laoTranslation: ການຕັດສິນໃຈເປັນເອກະສັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การตัดสินใจเป็นเอกฉันท์
words.definition: A choice made fully supported by everyone involved.
words.exampleSentence: The board reached a unanimous decision to hire him.

words.laoTranslation: ມີສ່ວນຮ່ວມໂດຍບໍ່ຮູ້ຕົວ
words.thaiTranslation: มีส่วนร่วมโดยไม่รู้ตัว/ไม่ได้ตั้งใจ
words.definition: To take part in something without being aware of it.
words.exampleSentence: He unwittingly participated in a financial scam.

words.laoTranslation: ສ້າງຄວາມເສຍຫາຍຢ່າງຮ້າຍແຮງ
words.thaiTranslation: สร้างความเสียหายอย่างรุนแรง
words.definition: To cause great damage, chaos, or destruction.
words.exampleSentence: The hurricane wreaked havoc on the coastal town.

words.laoTranslation: ກວດສອບ, ສືບສວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบ, สืบสวนหาข้อเท็จจริง
words.definition: Investigate a matter or situation.
words.exampleSentence: The police are looking into the cause of the accident.

words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າຄວບຄຸມ, ຮັບຊ່ວງຕໍ່
words.thaiTranslation: เข้าควบคุม, รับช่วงต่อ
words.definition: Assume control of something from someone else.
words.exampleSentence: The vice president will take over the company next month.

words.laoTranslation: ລ້ຽງດູ / ຍົກຫົວຂໍ້ຂຶ້ນມາເວົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เลี้ยงดู / หยิบยกประเด็นขึ้นมาพูด
words.definition: Raise a child; or mention a topic in a conversation.
words.exampleSentence: She brought up an interesting point during the meeting.

words.laoTranslation: ລົ້ມເຫຼວ, ບໍ່ສຳເລັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ล้มเหลว, ล่ม (แผนการ)
words.definition: Fail to happen or be completed successfully.
words.exampleSentence: Our travel plans fell through because we couldn't get visas.

words.laoTranslation: ທົບທວນ, ກວດທານ
words.thaiTranslation: ทบทวน, ตรวจสอบซ้ำ
words.definition: Review or examine something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Let's go over the details of the contract once more.

words.laoTranslation: ມີຢູ່ທຸກຫົນທຸກແຫ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: มีอยู่ทุกหนทุกแห่ง
words.definition: Present, appearing, or found everywhere.
words.exampleSentence: Mobile phones are now ubiquitous in modern society.

words.laoTranslation: ຄົງຢູ່ບໍ່ດົນ, ຊົ່ວຄາວ
words.thaiTranslation: คงอยู่ไม่นาน, ชั่วคราว
words.definition: Lasting for a very short time.
words.exampleSentence: Fame in the internet age is often ephemeral.

words.laoTranslation: ຜ່ອນຄາຍ, ເຮັດໃຫ້ເບົາບາງລົງ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรเทา, ทำให้เบาบางลง
words.definition: Make less severe, serious, or painful.
words.exampleSentence: Good planning can help mitigate the risks of the project.

words.laoTranslation: ຕາມໃຈຕົວເອງ, ປ່ຽນແປງງ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เปลี่ยนแปลงง่าย, ตามอารมณ์
words.definition: Given to sudden and unaccountable changes of mood or behavior.
words.exampleSentence: The administration was criticized for its capricious decision-making.

words.laoTranslation: ຜັດວັນປະກັນພຸ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลัดวันประกันพรุ่ง
words.definition: Delay or postpone action; put off doing something.
words.exampleSentence: If you procrastinate, you will miss the assignment deadline.

words.laoTranslation: ມີວາທະສິນ, ເວົ້າເກັ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: มีวาทศิลป์, พูดจาคมคาย
words.definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
words.exampleSentence: She made an eloquent speech that touched everyone's heart.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫຼືອເຟືອ, ເກີນຄວາມຈຳເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เกินความจำเป็น, เหลือเฟือ
words.definition: Unnecessary, especially through being more than enough.
words.exampleSentence: The report contained a lot of superfluous details.

words.laoTranslation: ພິຖີພິຖັນ, ຊື່ສັດ, ລະມັດລະວັງ
words.thaiTranslation: ถี่ถ้วน, ซื่อสัตย์, ระมัดระวังรอบคอบ
words.definition: Diligent, thorough, and extremely attentive to details; or strictly honest.
words.exampleSentence: The accountant was scrupulous in keeping the company's records.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມທຸກຍາກ, ອຸປະສັກ
words.thaiTranslation: ความทุกข์ยาก, อุปสรรค
words.definition: Difficulties; misfortune.
words.exampleSentence: She showed great courage in the face of adversity.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳກວມ, ບໍ່ຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: กำกวม, ไม่ชัดเจน
words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; ambiguous.
words.exampleSentence: The politician gave an equivocal answer to the question.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມເມີນເສີຍ, ບໍ່ສົນໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ความเฉยเมย, ความไร้อารมณ์
words.definition: Lack of interest, enthusiasm, or concern.
words.exampleSentence: There is a growing voter apathy among young people.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນແບບຢ່າງ, ດີເລີດ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นแบบอย่างที่ดี, ดีเลิศ
words.definition: Serving as a desirable model; representing the best of its kind.
words.exampleSentence: His exemplary conduct earned him a promotion.

words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ໄດ້ຕັ້ງໃຈ, ພ້ອມບໍ່ຮູ້ຕົວ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่ได้ตั้งใจ, เผลอเรอ
words.definition: Not resulting from or achieved through deliberate planning.
words.exampleSentence: The omission of his name from the list was inadvertent.

words.laoTranslation: ຊັດເຈນ, ເຂົ້າໃຈງ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ชัดเจน, เข้าใจง่าย
words.definition: Expressed clearly; easy to understand.
words.exampleSentence: The teacher gave a lucid explanation of a complex theory.

words.laoTranslation: ຄ思, ຄຶດງຳ, ເສົ້າໝອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ครุ่นคิด, เหม่อลอยด้วยความกังวล
words.definition: Engaged in, involving, or reflecting deep or serious thought.
words.exampleSentence: She sat by the window with a pensive look on her face.

words.laoTranslation: ຍົກເລີກ, ເພິກຖອນ
words.thaiTranslation: เพิกถอน, ยกเลิก (กฎหมาย/สัญญา)
words.definition: Revoke, cancel, or repeal (a law, order, or agreement).
words.exampleSentence: The government decided to rescind the controversial tax policy.

words.laoTranslation: ໜຽວແໜ້ນ, ບໍ່ຍອມຈຳນົນ
words.thaiTranslation: เหนียวแน่น, ไม่ยอมแพ้ง่ายๆ
words.definition: Tending to keep a firm hold of something; clinging or adhering closely; persistent.
words.exampleSentence: She is a tenacious advocate for women's rights.

words.laoTranslation: ພິສູດຄວາມບໍລິສຸດ, ກູ້ຊື່ສຽງ
words.thaiTranslation: พิสูจน์ความบริสุทธิ์, คืนความยุติธรรม
words.definition: Clear (someone) of blame or suspicion; prove to be right or justified.
words.exampleSentence: The new laboratory evidence will vindicate the suspect.

words.laoTranslation: ກະຕືລືລົ້ນ, ຈິງຈັງ
words.thaiTranslation: กระตือรือร้น, เลื่อมใสศรัทธาอย่างมาก
words.definition: Having or showing great zeal; full of enthusiasm.
words.exampleSentence: The candidate has a team of zealous volunteers.

words.laoTranslation: ປາກໜັກ, ບໍ່ຄ່ອຍເວົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบขรึม, ไม่ค่อยพูด
words.definition: Not revealing one's thoughts or feelings readily.
words.exampleSentence: He was extremely reticent about his personal life.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຂາດແຄນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความขาดแคลน
words.definition: The state of being scarce or in short supply; shortage.
words.exampleSentence: The scarcity of clean water is a major issue in the region.

words.laoTranslation: ບັນເທົາ, ເຮັດໃຫ້ເບົາບາງ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรเทา, ทำให้เบาลง
words.definition: Make (suffering, deficiency, or a problem) less severe.
words.exampleSentence: Take this medicine to alleviate your headache.

words.laoTranslation: ອຳນາດອະທິປະໄຕ
words.thaiTranslation: อำนาจอธิปไตย
words.definition: Supreme power or authority; the authority of a state to govern itself.
words.exampleSentence: The country fought hard to defend its national sovereignty.

words.laoTranslation: ຈຳເປັນຢ່າງຍິ່ງ, ຫຼີກເວັ້ນບໍ່ໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: จำเป็นอย่างยิ่ง, หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้
words.definition: Of vital importance; crucial.
words.exampleSentence: It is imperative that we release the update before Friday.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫັນໄດ້ຊັດເຈນ, ສະດຸດຕາ
words.thaiTranslation: เห็นได้ชัดเจน, สะดุดตา
words.definition: Standing out so as to be clearly visible.
words.exampleSentence: The red tower was conspicuous against the sky.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນອັນຕະລາຍ, ສົ່ງຜົນຮ້າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นอันตราย, ส่งผลเสีย
words.definition: Causing harm or damage.
words.exampleSentence: Smoking has a deleterious effect on your lungs.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼວງຫຼາຍ, ມີເນື້ອມີໜັງ
words.thaiTranslation: มากมาย, มีสาระสำคัญ
words.definition: Of considerable importance, size, or worth.
words.exampleSentence: They made a substantial investment in renewable energy.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້, ສາມາດເຮັດໄດ້ຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปได้, สามารถทำได้จริง
words.definition: Possible to do easily or conveniently.
words.exampleSentence: It's not economically feasible to build a bridge here.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼົບຫຼີກເກັ່ງ, ຈັບຕົວໄດ້ຍາກ
words.thaiTranslation: จับตัวยาก, หลบหลีกเก่ง
words.definition: Difficult to find, catch, or achieve.
words.exampleSentence: Success remained elusive despite his hard work.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນປະໂຫຍດ, ໃຫ້ຄຸນ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นประโยชน์, ได้เปรียบ
words.definition: Involving or creating favorable circumstances that increase the chances of success.
words.exampleSentence: The new tax law is advantageous to small businesses.

words.laoTranslation: ກ່ຽວກັບການຮັບຮູ້/ການຄິດ
words.thaiTranslation: เกี่ยวกับกระบวนการคิด/การรับรู้
words.definition: Relating to the mental action or process of acquiring knowledge and understanding.
words.exampleSentence: As children grow, their cognitive skills develop rapidly.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດລົງ, ຈຳກັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลดลง, จำกัด
words.definition: Reduce in extent or quantity; impose a restriction on.
words.exampleSentence: The school decided to curtail spending on sports equipment.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມແຕກຕ່າງ, ຄວາມບໍ່ສອດຄ່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ความไม่สอดคล้องกัน, ความคลาดเคลื่อน
words.definition: An illogical or surprising lack of compatibility or similarity between two or more facts.
words.exampleSentence: There was a discrepancy between the two financial reports.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ໄດ້ຈາກການທົດລອງ/ປະສົບການຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ได้จากประสบการณ์หรือการทดลองจริง
words.definition: Based on, concerned with, or verifiable by observation or experience rather than theory.
words.exampleSentence: They provided empirical evidence to support their theory.

words.laoTranslation: ຜັນຜວນ, ຂຶ້ນໆລົງໆ
words.thaiTranslation: ผันผวน, ขึ้นๆ ลงๆ
words.definition: Rise and fall irregularly in number or amount.
words.exampleSentence: Oil prices fluctuate due to global supply and demand.

words.laoTranslation: ຂັດຂວາງ, ເປັນອຸປະສັກ
words.thaiTranslation: ขัดขวาง, เป็นอุปสรรค
words.definition: Make it difficult for (someone) to do something or for (something) to happen.
words.exampleSentence: High winds hindered the firefighters' efforts to control the blaze.

words.laoTranslation: ພື້ນເມືອງ, ດັ້ງເດີມ
words.thaiTranslation: พื้นเมือง, ดั้งเดิม
words.definition: Originating or occurring naturally in a particular place; native.
words.exampleSentence: The kangaroo is indigenous to Australia.

words.laoTranslation: ຈືດຊື້, ທຳມະດາສາມັນ
words.thaiTranslation: น่าเบื่อ, ทางโลกย์, ธรรมดาสามัน
words.definition: Lacking interest or excitement; dull.
words.exampleSentence: She was tired of the mundane routine of her everyday office work.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດຮອດບ້ານ/ອະດີດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความถวิลหาอดีต, ความคิดถึงบ้าน
words.definition: A sentimental longing or wistful affection for the past.
words.exampleSentence: Hearing that old song filled him with nostalgia.

words.laoTranslation: ມີອຳນາດສູງສຸດ, ຊົງພະລັງ
words.thaiTranslation: มีอำนาจทุกประการ, ทรงพลัง
words.definition: Having unlimited power; able to do anything.
words.exampleSentence: In ancient myths, the king was considered an omnipotent ruler.

words.laoTranslation: ລົງມືປະຕິບັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลงมือทำ, ดำเนินการ
words.definition: Do something to achieve an aim or deal with a situation.
words.exampleSentence: The government must take action to stop inflation.

words.laoTranslation: ເສຍໃຈຢ່າງສຸດຊຶ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: เสียใจอย่างสุดซึ้ง
words.definition: To feel extremely sorry or remorseful about something.
words.exampleSentence: I deeply regret my choice of words last night.

words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ
words.definition: To choose something after thinking about the possibilities.
words.exampleSentence: You need to make a decision before Friday.

words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້ຢ່າງເຕັມສ່ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้อย่างเต็มที่
words.definition: Having complete knowledge or understanding of a situation.
words.exampleSentence: I am fully aware of the consequences of my choice.

words.laoTranslation: ຕອບສະໜອງຕາມຄວາມຕ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปตามข้อกำหนด
words.definition: To fulfill the rules, standards, or conditions necessary.
words.exampleSentence: Applicants must meet the requirements listed in the description.

words.laoTranslation: ເອົາໃຈໃສ່, ຕັ້ງໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจ, ใส่ใจ
words.definition: Listen, watch, or consider something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the teacher.

words.laoTranslation: ປັບປຸງດີຂຶ້ນຢ່າງມາກມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ปรับปรุงดีขึ้นอย่างมาก
words.definition: Changed to be much better than before.
words.exampleSentence: The new system is vastly improved compared to last year.

words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບປະສົບການ
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับประสบการณ์
words.definition: To get knowledge or skill from doing something.
words.exampleSentence: This internship is a great way to gain experience.

words.laoTranslation: ແນະນຳຢ່າງເດັດຂາດ
words.thaiTranslation: แนะนำอย่างแข็งขัน/เด็ดขาด
words.definition: To offer recommendations with high emphasis.
words.exampleSentence: I strongly advise you to double-check the contract.

words.laoTranslation: ເຜີຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย
words.definition: To deal with a difficult situation or obstacle.
words.exampleSentence: Small businesses face a challenge due to high taxes.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄພຄຸກຄາມ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นภัยคุกคาม
words.definition: To create a dangerous situation or risk.
words.exampleSentence: Cyber attacks pose a threat to national security.

words.laoTranslation: ຈື່ຈໍາໄວ້, ຄໍານຶงໄວ້
words.thaiTranslation: จำใส่ใจไว้, คำนึงถึง
words.definition: Remember or consider information while making plans or decisions.
words.exampleSentence: Bear in mind that the office will close early today.

words.laoTranslation: ລົດຕິດຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การจราจรติดขัด/หนาแน่น
words.definition: A large volume of vehicles on the road causing slow movement.
words.exampleSentence: I was late for work due to heavy traffic.

words.laoTranslation: ໄຮ້ສາລະຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไร้สาระอย่างสิ้นเชิง
words.definition: Completely absurd or laughable.
words.exampleSentence: The idea that cats can fly is utterly ridiculous.

words.laoTranslation: ໜາວຈັດ, ໜາວສຸດໆ
words.thaiTranslation: หนาวจัด, หนาวเหน็บ
words.definition: Extremely cold in an unpleasant way.
words.exampleSentence: The winter wind made it a bitterly cold morning.

words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໜ້າຕັ້ງຕາຄອຍຖ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งหน้าตั้งตารอ
words.definition: Await something with excitement or pleasure.
words.exampleSentence: I look forward to meeting you next week.

words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນເວລາອອກໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนออกไป, ผลัดวันประกันพรุ่ง
words.definition: Postpone an event or activity.
words.exampleSentence: Don't put off until tomorrow what you can do today.

words.laoTranslation: ໝົດ, ບໍ່ເຫຼືອ
words.thaiTranslation: หมด, ไม่มีเหลือ
words.definition: Use up the supply of something.
words.exampleSentence: We ran out of milk, so I need to go to the shop.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ເກີດຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เกิดขึ้น, ก่อให้เกิด
words.definition: Cause something to happen.
words.exampleSentence: The new technology brought about major changes in the workplace.

words.laoTranslation: ດູຖູກ, ສົບປະໝາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ดูถูก, เหยียดหยาม
words.definition: Think that someone or something is inferior.
words.exampleSentence: You shouldn't look down on people just because they are poor.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳກວມ
words.thaiTranslation: กำกวม
words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning.
words.exampleSentence: His reply to my question was somewhat ambiguous.

words.laoTranslation: ຢືດຢຸ່ນ, ທົນທານ
words.thaiTranslation: ยืดหยุ่น, ทนทาน
words.definition: Able to withstand or recover quickly from difficult conditions.
words.exampleSentence: She is a resilient girl who quickly recovered from the illness.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຮ້າຍແຮງຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้แย่ลง
words.definition: Make a problem, bad situation, or negative feeling worse.
words.exampleSentence: Running will only exacerbate your knee injury.

words.laoTranslation: ປະຕິບັດຕົວຈິງ, ເປັນຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: ในทางปฏิบัติ, เน้นผลจริง
words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically in a way that is based on practical considerations.
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to management.

words.laoTranslation: ພິຖີພິຖັນ, ລະອຽດລະອໍ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน, ละเอียดถี่ถ้วน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise.
words.exampleSentence: He was meticulous about keeping his desk clean.

words.laoTranslation: ອຸດົມສົມບູນ, ມາກມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: อุดมสมบูรณ์, มากมาย
words.definition: Existing or available in large quantities; overflowing.
words.exampleSentence: The region is famous for its abundant natural resources.

words.laoTranslation: ເມດຕາກະລຸນາ
words.thaiTranslation: เมตตากรุณา, ใจบุญ
words.definition: Well meaning and kindly.
words.exampleSentence: A benevolent gentleman donated money to the orphanage.

words.laoTranslation: ກວດກາຢ່າງລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด
words.definition: Examine or inspect closely and thoroughly.
words.exampleSentence: Customers were warned to scrutinize the small print.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼ້າສະໄໝ, ເລີກໃຊ້
words.thaiTranslation: ล้าสมัย, เลิกใช้แล้ว
words.definition: No longer produced or used; out of date.
words.exampleSentence: New technologies render old computers obsolete.

words.laoTranslation: ສະໜັບສະໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: สนับสนุน, เป็นกระบอกเสียง
words.definition: Publicly recommend or support.
words.exampleSentence: They advocate for human rights worldwide.

words.laoTranslation: ຜິວເຜີນ
words.thaiTranslation: ผิวเผิน, ไม่ลึกซึ้ง
words.definition: Existing or occurring at or on the surface; lacking depth.
words.exampleSentence: The book only provides a superficial analysis of the issue.

words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້, ຕຣະໜັກຮູ້
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้, รับรู้
words.definition: Having knowledge or being aware of.
words.exampleSentence: Statesmen must be cognizant of the political situation.

words.laoTranslation: ຂະຫຍັນໝັ່ນພຽນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขยันหมั่นเพียร
words.definition: Showing care and conscientiousness in one's work or duties.
words.exampleSentence: A diligent student will always excel in class.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັ່ງອອກມາ, ຫຼັ່ງໄຫຼ
words.thaiTranslation: แผ่ออกมา, ส่งกลิ่น/แสง
words.definition: Issue or spread out from (a source).
words.exampleSentence: Warmth began to emanate from the fireplace.

words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ມີສາລະ, ຫຼິ້ນໆ
words.thaiTranslation: ไร้สาระ, ไม่สำคัญ
words.definition: Not having any serious purpose or value.
words.exampleSentence: Sorry, I shouldn't waste your time with frivolous complaints.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼີກເວັ້ນບໍ່ໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้
words.definition: Certain to happen; unavoidable.
words.exampleSentence: Change is an inevitable part of life.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເຮັດກຳໄລໄດ້ດີ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ทำกำไรงดงาม
words.definition: Producing a great deal of profit.
words.exampleSentence: She turned her hobby into a lucrative business.

words.laoTranslation: ແປກໃໝ່
words.thaiTranslation: แปลกใหม่
words.definition: New or unusual in an interesting way.
words.exampleSentence: The architect presented a novel design for the building.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້, ສົມເຫດສົມຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: สมเหตุสมผล, เป็นไปได้
words.definition: Seeming reasonable or probable.
words.exampleSentence: The story sounded plausible, so we believed her.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫຼືອເຟືອ, ບໍ່ຈຳເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ซ้ำซ้อน, เกินความจำเป็น
words.definition: Not or no longer needed or useful; superfluous.
words.exampleSentence: The programmer removed the redundant lines of code.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way
words.exampleSentence: Finding this restaurant was pure serendipity.

words.definition: Lasting for a very short time
words.exampleSentence: Fashions are ephemeral; trends come and go overnight.

words.definition: Present, appearing, or found everywhere
words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

words.definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness
words.exampleSentence: Her resilience in the face of adversity was inspiring.

words.definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
words.exampleSentence: She gave an eloquent speech that moved the audience.

words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to solve this problem.

words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning
words.exampleSentence: The contract was ambiguous about payment terms.

words.definition: Truthful and straightforward; frank
words.exampleSentence: She was candid about her reasons for leaving.

words.definition: Having or showing care and conscientiousness in work or duties
words.exampleSentence: He was a diligent student who always completed his assignments.

words.definition: The quality of being thankful; readiness to show appreciation
words.exampleSentence: She expressed her gratitude for all the help she received.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດຮອດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง
words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past
words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.laoTranslation: ລະອຽດລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise
words.exampleSentence: The research was conducted with meticulous care.

words.laoTranslation: ລົງມືປະຕິບັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลงมือทำ, ดำเนินการ

words.exampleSentence: The government must take action to stop inflation.

words.laoTranslation: ເສຍໃຈຢ່າງສຸດຊຶ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: เสียใจอย่างสุดซึ้ง
words.definition: To feel extremely sorry or remorseful about something.
words.exampleSentence: I deeply regret my choice of words last night.

words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ
words.definition: To choose something after thinking about the possibilities.
words.exampleSentence: You need to make a decision before Friday.

words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້ຢ່າງເຕັມສ່ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้อย่างเต็มที่
words.definition: Having complete knowledge or understanding of a situation.

words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปตามข้อกำหนด
words.definition: To fulfill the rules, standards, or conditions necessary.
words.exampleSentence: Applicants must meet the requirements listed in the description.

words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจ, ใส่ใจ

words.definition: New or unusual in an interesting way.
words.exampleSentence: The architect presented a novel design for the building.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້, ສົມເຫດສົມຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: สมเหตุสมผล, เป็นไปได้
words.definition: Seeming reasonable or probable.
words.exampleSentence: The story sounded plausible, so we believed her.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫຼືອເຟືອ, ບໍ່ຈຳເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ซ้ำซ้อน, เกินความจำเป็น
words.definition: Not or no longer needed or useful; superfluous.
words.exampleSentence: The programmer removed the redundant lines of code.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way
words.exampleSentence: Finding this restaurant was pure serendipity.

words.definition: Lasting for a very short time
words.exampleSentence: Fashions are ephemeral; trends come and go overnight.

words.definition: Present, appearing, or found everywhere
words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

words.definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness
words.exampleSentence: Her resilience in the face of adversity was inspiring.

words.definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
words.exampleSentence: She gave an eloquent speech that moved the audience.

words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to solve this problem.

words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning
words.exampleSentence: The contract was ambiguous about payment terms.

words.definition: Truthful and straightforward; frank
words.exampleSentence: She was candid about her reasons for leaving.

words.definition: Having or showing care and conscientiousness in work or duties
words.exampleSentence: He was a diligent student who always completed his assignments.

words.definition: The quality of being thankful; readiness to show appreciation
words.exampleSentence: She expressed her gratitude for all the help she received.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດຮອດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง
words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past
words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.laoTranslation: ລະອຽດລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise
words.exampleSentence: The research was conducted with meticulous care.
